overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark, industrial corridor in a sci-fi video game. The player moves slowly through a dimly lit metal hallway illuminated by distant ceiling lights and a green emergency light strip, creating a tense, atmospheric environment.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously down the dark corridor toward the distant red exit light

entered.detail: horizontal emergency light strip glowing yellow-green on the left wall
series of small white lights running down the center of the ceiling
small red illuminated sign visible at the far end of the corridor
dark metal stairs with handrail on the left side of the corridor
corrugated metal wall panels with vertical ridges

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a slow walk down a narrow, dark industrial corridor. A green emergency light strip runs along the left wall, while distant ceiling lights and a red exit sign are visible ahead. The metal walls and reflective floor create a claustrophobic, atmospheric sci-fi environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase landing with ribbed metal walls

events.description: camera turns left toward the wall with the green emergency light strip

agents.ego_description: turning left and approaching the metal staircase with the green light strip

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and approaches the staircase on the left wall. The green emergency light strip becomes the focal point as the distant corridor lights disappear from view. The ribbed metal wall texture fills the frame as the player moves closer to the staircase structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that shifts from a deep perspective view to a close-up encounter with a structural transition. It begins with a slow walk down a narrow metal hallway, where a green emergency light strip on the left wall and a distant red exit sign pierce the dim atmosphere. As the camera advances, the reflective floor and distant ceiling lights guide the path forward through the oppressive sci-fi environment. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left, causing the distant corridor lights to vanish from view while the green light strip becomes the primary focal point. Finally, the perspective closes in on the ribbed texture of the metal wall as the camera approaches the staircase structure.
